title: gastrochilus pumilis
intro: Gastrochilus pumilis, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, Gastrochilus pumilis has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Gastrochilus pumilis is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
